title: Plant Quarantine Facilities Developmed at ICRISAT for export of Germplasm
abstract:
Seeds play a vital role in the production of
food. The need to Increase food production
rapidly has necessitated the ICRISAT scientists
to e~change of germ plasm frequently with many
countries for the purpose of collection, breeding
and distribution. The quantity of seed exported
since the inception of ICRISAT (Table 1) shows
the magnitude of effort made in this direction.
Since 1974, 4,20,040 seed samples and other plant
materials have been exported to scientists all
over the world, who are also interested in the
development programmes of ICRISAT's five
mandate crops.
